input: Meeting conclusion: We will decide on the new CRM after the sales team submits their requirements. Requirements deadline: March 15. Decision owner: VP Sales will decide by March 18. Interim action: IT will prepare integration checklist by March 10.
output_rubric: Must classify as INTENTIONAL_DEFERRAL. Must validate all four deferral elements: specific information needed (CRM requirements), deadline (March 15/18), decision owner (VP Sales), interim action (integration checklist).
evidence: Proper intentional deferral. All four deferral structure elements present.
